texto: I learned that if you love a boy you are o longer free. The boy may become more important than your own self and if it is so, you will find trouble there. The first time you are hurt in your heart, you do not forget the lesson. It stays forever.
explicacao: Citação de Susan Minot sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I learned that if you love a boy you are o longer free. The boy may become more important than yo…” articula amor, heartbreak, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: For a girl, with each boy it’s as though a petal gets plucked each time.
explicacao: Citação de Susan Minot sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “For a girl, with each boy it’s as though a petal gets plucked each time.” articula reflexao, sex, though em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: He had made his decision. Later in life Ann would learn that when certain men made decisions no matter how much it might torture them afterwards they would stick with their decision. Men, she learned, would rather suffer than change their minds or their habits. They could develop elaborate systems for containing pain, sometimes so successful they would remain completely unaware of the vastness of the pain they possessed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Susan Minot sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “He had made his decision. Later in life Ann would learn that when certain men made decisions no m…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, decisions, men, útil em momentos de mudanca e men.

frase_original: He had made his decision. Later in life Ann would learn that when certain men made decisions no matter how much it might torture them afterwards they would stick with their decision. Men, she learned, would rather suffer than change their minds or their habits. They could develop elaborate systems for containing pain, sometimes so successful they would remain completely unaware of the vastness of the pain they possessed.
